summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of TuneDrop Kalmori landing page redesign. All design elements match user's exact specifications from screenshots. Backend APIs working perfectly with 100% success rate.
passed_tests: KALMORI logo in magenta/purple color with gradient underline
G.O.A.T In Music Distribution headline with proper magenta styling
Hero section with concert background image and typewriter effect
Pink/magenta CTA button 'DISTRIBUTE MY MUSIC ONLINE' with data-testid
$20/Year gold pricing in Unlimited Distribution section
All 6 platform cards: Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, TikTok, Amazon, Deezer
Global Reach section with 'Everywhere' text and concert image
Need Beats purple gradient card with instrumentals text
Why Choose Kalmori section with feature list
Real-Time Analytics section with feature breakdown
Pricing cards with gold 'BEST DEAL' highlight on Album plan
Purple floating action button with scroll-to-top functionality
Mobile responsive design with working hamburger menu
Mobile menu overlay with KALMORI branding and navigation
Login flow working correctly with admin credentials
Successful authentication and redirection to dashboard
KALMORI branding consistency across all pages
Navigation between landing page and login page
Backend API health check (100% success rate)
All backend endpoints working correctly
